description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci build that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: ubuntu-cmake, fedora-cmake, and ubuntu-bazel, each running on ubuntu-latest. The ubuntu-cmake job should check out the code, install dependencies, update submodules, and run various make commands. The fedora-cmake job should set up Podman, create a container, and run tests. The ubuntu-bazel job should check out the code, install Bazel 5.4.0, and run a Bazel build.
